user.title: Add BluOS device
user.description: Enter the IP address of a BluOS player. Multi-zone units (such as the NAD CI580) are added with all of their zones.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of the BluOS player.

abort.already_configured: This BluOS unit is already configured
abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress

add_to_queue.name: Add to queue
add_to_queue.description: Add a browsed BluOS item to the play queue.

media_content_id.name: Media content ID
media_content_id.description: The content ID of a BluOS browse item (from media browse).

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Where to add it: play now, play next, or add to the end.

add_favourite.name: Add favourite
add_favourite.description: Mark a browsed BluOS item as a favourite in its music service.

media_content_id.name: Media content ID
media_content_id.description: The content ID of a BluOS browse item (from media browse).

clear_queue.name: Clear queue
clear_queue.description: Remove all tracks from the current play queue.

save_queue.name: Save queue
save_queue.description: Save the current play queue as a named BluOS playlist.

remove_from_queue.name: Remove from queue
remove_from_queue.description: Remove the track at the given position from the play queue.

position.name: Position
position.description: Zero-based position of the track to remove.

move_in_queue.name: Move in queue
move_in_queue.description: Move a track to a new position within the play queue.

from_position.name: From position
from_position.description: Current zero-based position of the track.

to_position.name: To position
to_position.description: New zero-based position for the track.
